introSection: Corona Cobra Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Fantasy Forest Amusement Park in Flushing, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: It opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! Southfield in 1999. It then closed in 2012. In May 2013, the attraction opened at Fantasy Forest Amusement Park. It was named Corona Cobra Coaster following a "name the ride" contest.

fullText:
Corona Cobra Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Fantasy Forest Amusement Park in Flushing, New York, USA.

It opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! Southfield in 1999. It then closed in 2012. In May 2013, the attraction opened at Fantasy Forest Amusement Park. It was named Corona Cobra Coaster following a "name the ride" contest.
